response_text: PCR is a laboratory technique used to amplify DNA sequences exponentially through thermal cycling involving denaturation, annealing, and extension steps...
Mutations are changes in DNA sequence that can lead to genetic disorders such as cystic fibrosis or sickle cell anemia...
R0 represents the average number of secondary infections produced by one infected individual in a fully susceptible population...
Competitive inhibition occurs when an inhibitor binds to the active site of an enzyme...
Key outbreak control strategies include vaccination, isolation, contact tracing, and public health communication...
